Localization.Description: An object, resource, or process was blocked or quarantined

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Access to resource {object.storage.name} was blocked for user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Infected object {object.storage.name} will be quarantined after reboot on host {event_src.host}
Infected object {object.storage.name} is quarantined on host {event_src.host}
Start of process {object.storage.name} is blocked for user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
